---
title: "Working Paper Title"
author:
  - name: "Author One"
    email: "author.one@example.org"
    corresponding: true
    affiliation:
      - "1"
  - name: "Author Two"
    affiliation:
      - "1"
      - "2"
affiliations:
  - id: "1"
    name: "Institute Name"
  - id: "2"
    name: "University Name"
abstract: |
  Replace this placeholder with your abstract. This paper examines...
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  typstR-typst: default
typstR:
  keywords:
    - keyword one
    - keyword two
  jel:
    - C10
    - F13
  acknowledgements: |
    The authors thank...
  report-number: "WP 001"
  funding: |
    This research was supported by...
---

## Introduction

Introduce the research question here. @smith2020 provide relevant background.

## Data and Methods

Describe data sources and empirical strategy.

## Results

Present main findings.

## Conclusion

Summarize contributions and implications.

## References
